name: Synthetic Monitoring Dashboard
description: Comprehensive synthetic monitoring dashboard with detailed metrics and analysis

nrql.query:
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE result = 
\SUCCESS') FROM SyntheticCheck SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM SyntheticCheck SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(duration) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \SUCCESS' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE result = \SUCCESS') FROM SyntheticCheck TIMESERIES 15 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT average(duration), percentile(duration, 95) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \SUCCESS' FACET location SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE result = \SUCCESS') FROM SyntheticCheck FACET checkType SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT timestamp, checkType, location, target, duration, errorType FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \FAILED' SINCE 6 hours ago ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT histogram(duration, 20, 100) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \SUCCESS' SINCE 24 hours ago FACET checkType
SELECT count(*) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \FAILED' FACET location, errorType SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT average(duration) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \SUCCESS' FACET location, checkType TIMESERIES 30 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT target, average(duration), percentile(duration, 95), count(*) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \SUCCESS' FACET target SINCE 24 hours ago ORDER BY average(duration) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT target, average(daysUntilExpiry), count(*) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE checkType = \SSL' FACET target SINCE 24 hours ago ORDER BY average(daysUntilExpiry) ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT percentile(duration, 50), percentile(duration, 95), percentile(duration, 99) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \SUCCESS' TIMESERIES 15 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM SyntheticCheck FACET hourOf(timestamp) SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT average(duration) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \SUCCESS' AND hourOf(timestamp) >= 9 AND hourOf(timestamp) <= 17 TIMESERIES 1 hour SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE result = \FAILED') FROM SyntheticCheck TIMESERIES 30 minutes SINCE 24 hours ago
